subject: [PATCH v2 4/6] mm/huge_memory: move softleaf_to_folio() inside migration branch

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch moves the call to softleaf_to_folio() inside a migration branch in the change_non_present_huge_pmd() function, ensuring that it only extracts and converts PFNs to folio pointers when necessary for migration or device-private entries. This prevents bogus pointer creation and potential crashes on mprotect() when swap entries are present.
